2604.01021.title: Transfer learning for nonparametric Bayesian networks
2604.01021.paper_summary: This paper introduces two transfer learning methodologies for estimating nonparametric Bayesian networks under scarce data. We propose two algorithms, a constraint-based structure learning method, called PC-stable-transfer learning (PCS-TL), and a score-based method, called hill climbing transfer learning (HC-TL). We also define particular metrics to tackle the negative transfer problem in each of them, a situation in which transfer learning has a negative impact on the model's performance. Then, for the parameters, we propose a log-linear pooling approach. For the evaluation, we learn kernel density estimation Bayesian networks, a type of nonparametric Bayesian network, and compare their transfer learning performance with the models alone. To do so, we sample data from small, medium and large-sized synthetic networks and datasets from the UCI Machine Learning repository. Then, we add noise and modifications to these datasets to test their ability to avoid negative transfer. To conclude, we perform a Friedman test with a Bergmann-Hommel post-hoc analysis to show statistical proof of the enhanced experimental behavior of our methods. Thus, PCS-TL and HC-TL demonstrate to be reliable algorithms for improving the learning performance of a nonparametric Bayesian network with scarce data, which in real industrial environments implies a reduction in the required time to deploy the network.
2604.01021.paper_summary_zh: 本論文介紹了兩種在稀疏數據下估計非參數貝葉斯網絡的轉移學習方法。<lb/>我們提出了兩種算法，一種是基於約束的結構學習方法，稱為PC-stable-transfer learning (PCS-TL)，另一種是基於評分的方法，稱為hill climbing transfer learning (HC-TL)。<lb/>我們還定義了特定的度量來解決每種方法中的負轉移問題，即轉移學習對模型性能產生負面影響的情況。<lb/>然後，對於參數，我們提出了一種對數線性池化方法。<lb/>在評估方面，我們學習了核密度估計貝葉斯網絡，這是一種非參數貝葉斯網絡，並將它們的轉移學習性能與單獨模型進行比較。<lb/>為此，我們從小型、中型和大型合成網絡以及UCI機器學習庫中的數據集抽樣數據。<lb/>接著，我們對這些數據集添加噪音和修改，以測試它們避免負轉移的能力。<lb/>最後，我們進行了Friedman檢驗，並進行了Bergmann-Hommel事後分析，以顯示我們方法的增強實驗行為的統計證據。<lb/>因此，PCS-TL和HC-TL證明是可靠的算法，能夠改善在稀疏數據下的非參數貝葉斯網絡的學習性能，這在實際工業環境中意味著減少部署網絡所需的時間。
2604.01021.author: Rafael Sojo et.al.
2604.01021.authors: Rafael Sojo, Pedro Larrañaga, Concha Bielza
